notes: Added disabledTooltip?: string to SectionDef interface. Added contextual tooltip strings to all non-trivial sections (journey sections: 'Add a journey tab to enable'; improvements: 'Requires improvement ideas'; aiInsights: 'Requires AI analysis to be run'; etc.). Rendered as native title attribute on <label> only when !available. Removed the 'coming soon' span — tooltip on hover replaces it.
